Why_use_AI_course_post:
I use it to create citations in their respective style: MLA, APA, and Chicago, so I no longer have to go on the Citation Machine website and watch an ad. I also use it for revision ideas (What my strengths & weaknesses were in my essay) and continuity errors within my revision. For example, here is what I ask ChatGPT: "Please read through my essay to find any mistakes from my previous drafts that were not edited out and do not make sense in relation to my essay."

Because when I read through my revisions, I often skim since the idea is in my head, and so sometimes I won't catch the mistakes within my essay.
